news.title: Australian State Launches First Gas Tender in Years
news.snippet: New South Wales has launched its first natural gas exploration tender in a decade as Australia scrambles to secure domestic energy supplies.

news.title: Property industry warns CGT, negative gearing cuts will hurt home building, rental market
news.snippet: Australia's property industry warns any cuts to the capital gains tax discount or negative gearing concessions will hurt home building.

news.title: 8th Pay Commission: Big salary jump for government teachers? | The Economic Times
news.snippet: Central government teachers could see a major pay revision under the 8th Pay Commission if their wishlist for the 8 th CPC gets accepted.

news.title: Tomago Aluminium Bailout Talks: 2026 Deal Stalls
news.snippet: Explore why Tomago Aluminium bailout talks remain stalled and what a deal means for jobs and energy policy.

news.title: SA rental crisis: Anglicare data reveals housing lockout
news.snippet: The state's rental crisis has reached breaking point, with low-income earners either severely restricted or completely locked out of the market.

news.title: Albanese EPBC Approvals & Australia's Fuel Security
news.snippet: Explore how Albanese EPBC Act approvals and fuel security policies shape Australia's energy and resource regulatory future.
